# SafeJSON — Privacy-first JSON Formatter
> Format, validate, and debug JSON entirely in your browser. No server. No ads. No tracking.

## Core Tools

- [JSON Formatter](https://safejson.vercel.app/): Format and validate JSON with tree view, syntax highlighting, and error detection. 100% client-side.
- [JSON Beautifier](https://safejson.vercel.app/json-beautifier): Beautify minified JSON instantly. Paste compressed JSON, get clean indented output.
- [JSON Viewer](https://safejson.vercel.app/json-viewer): Explore JSON data with a collapsible tree view. See structure at a glance.
- [JSON Parser](https://safejson.vercel.app/json-parser): Parse JSON and inspect every field with data type and path.
- [JSON Diff Checker](https://safejson.vercel.app/diff): Compare two JSON objects side by side with color-coded changes.
- [JWT Decoder](https://safejson.vercel.app/jwt): Decode JWT tokens instantly — your token never leaves your device.
- [JSONPath Query](https://safejson.vercel.app/jsonpath): Query JSON with XPath-like expressions.
- [JSON Schema Validator](https://safejson.vercel.app/schema): Validate JSON against JSON Schema.
- [Pricing](https://safejson.vercel.app/pricing): Free core formatting. Pro tools for $5/month or $39/year.

## Pages

- [Privacy Policy](https://safejson.vercel.app/privacy): No data collection, storage, or transmission.
- [Help & FAQ](https://safejson.vercel.app/support): Step-by-step guides for every feature.
- [About](https://safejson.vercel.app/about): Mission, origin story, technology, and team.

## Comparisons

- [SafeJSON vs jsonformatter.org](https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/jsonformatter-org): Feature comparison. jsonformatter.org leaked 80,000+ credentials in 2025.
- [SafeJSON vs codebeautify.org](https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/codebeautify): Same 2025 breach.
- [SafeJSON vs JSON Formatter Extension](https://safejson.vercel.app/vs/jsonformatter-extension): 2M-user extension sold and turned into adware.

## Blog

- [Safest JSON Formatter 2026](https://safejson.vercel.app/blog/safest-json-formatter): 5 client-side tools compared. Covers the breach and how to verify safety.

## Key Facts
- 100% client-side JSON processing — zero network requests during formatting
- Open source (MIT): https://github.com/s01071233604-tech/safejson
- Free core formatting forever, Pro tools $5/month
- Browser extension on Edge Add-ons
- Built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS, deployed on Vercel
